title: Trailer Edition Title
description: This texture changes the main menu title to fit more with bare bones/ trailer vision!
body:
![How it should look ingame, The background doesnt change only the title!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d3f39bbadbd15981e4db213d689de609011c4fe_0.webp)This texture changes the main menu title to say "Minecraft Trailer Edition" It is made to use with bare bones or trailers vision as a way to enhance your main menu to fit more with the pack.

This pack was inspired by trailer exp. pack from [Axl0](https://modrinth.com/user/Axl0)

If you want the background this is the [Texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/just-update-it)
